---
output: 
  html_document:
    include:
      before_body: header.html
      after_body: footer.html
---

## Contact us {#contact}

Keep up with the news and products coming out of our small business directly by joining the mailing list.

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScrkta8EKiPSNBkvaNzI_S-ZEEaMc_M4TB3G9VLQLR8zQamxA/viewform?embedded=true" width="640" height="1090" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">Loading…</iframe>

*Please note:* All contact information is only used for Nip Skateboarding adventures.

### Community chat {#chat}

Strange Brew, Nip Skateboarding and other local community information can be found on the discord channel.

<iframe src="https://discordapp.com/widget?id=944760186789318736&theme=dark" width="350" height="500" allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" sandbox="allow-popups allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-same-origin allow-scripts"></iframe>
